commit.message:
fix: resolve 19 remaining test failures for CI

- Fix API tests: use FastAPI dependency_overrides instead of broken
  patch() for service factories (patch doesn't work with Depends())
- Seed test_user, test_organization, and membership into DB in conftest
  fixtures to satisfy FK constraints
- Fix timezone mismatch: use datetime.utcnow() in auth deps to match
  naive DB columns (timestamp without time zone)
- Add created_at to Message objects in chat service tests (Pydantic
  MessageResponse requires datetime, not None)
- Fix test_conversation_repo: expect NotFoundError instead of ValueError
- Fix test_audit_task_tracking: clear stale background tasks before test
- Expose test_app/admin_app fixtures for dependency override access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix gap logging format so gap_detector picks up discord-surfaced gaps

discord_listener wrote gap entries as {"type": "gap_signal", "detail": "..."}
but detect_operational_gaps expects {"success": false, "missing_capability": "name"}.
Gaps Jesse surfaced via Discord were logged but invisible to the generation loop.

- Add gap_name field to SYSTEM_PROMPT response format (snake_case capability name)
- Rewrite _write_gap_to_oplog to produce {"event": "gap_signal_from_...",
  "success": false, "missing_capability": gap_name, "detail": description}
- Thread gap_name through _dispatch_gap and _dispatch_request

Now when Jesse says "do you have conversational memory?" → model classifies
as GAP with gap_name="conversational_memory" → written to operation_log in
the format gap_detector understands → generation loop sees it next cycle.

117/117 tests passing.

confluence-mdx(test): reverse-sync 테스트케이스 환경을 정비합니다 (#897)

## Description

reverse-sync E2E 테스트케이스의 환경을 정비합니다.
`pages.yaml` 구조를 개선하고, `page.v1.yaml` 을 추가하여 `original.mdx` 가 올바르게 생성되는
환경을 갖춥니다.

### pages.yaml 형식 전환 (testcases dict → list)

- `testcases:` dict 형식에서 list 형식(`var/pages.yaml` 과 동일)으로 전환
- forward converter 가 이 파일을 페이지 카탈로그로 로드하여:
  - cross-page 링크(`<ac:link>`) 를 MDX 상대경로로 해소
  - `original.mdx` 에서 `#link-error` 발생 방지
- 포함 범위: 테스트케이스 38개 + 링크 대상 페이지 24개 = 62개 (전체 294개 중 필요한 것만)
- 테스트케이스 항목에는 `failure_type`, `severity`, `label` 등 메타데이터 임베드

### page.v1.yaml 추가 (38개)

- `var/{page_id}/page.v1.yaml` →
`tests/reverse-sync/{page_id}/page.v1.yaml`
- converter 가 이 파일에서 frontmatter(`title:`, `confluenceUrl:`) 와 `# h1`
제목을 자동 생성
- 실제로 사용되는 필드만 포함: `id`, `title`, `_links`(`base`, `webui`)
- `body.view.value` 는 외부 링크 pageId 해소에만 사용되나, 현재 테스트케이스 중 해당 케이스가 없어 제외

### original.mdx 재생성 (17개 변경)

- `#link-error`: 0건
- frontmatter 자동 생성 ✓
- h1 제목 자동 생성 ✓
- `page.xhtml` 기반 재생성 결과와 일치함 확인

### mapping.yaml 삭제 (21개)

- 포맷 변경 예정으로 기존 파일 전체 삭제
- `.gitignore` 에 `*/mapping.yaml` 추가 (converter 자동 생성 산출물)

### README.md 신규 작성

- pages.yaml 구조 및 두 가지 역할 설명
- 새 테스트케이스 추가 절차 (파일 준비 → pages.yaml 항목 추가 → 링크 대상 추가 → original.mdx 생성)
- 생성 결과 검증 방법 (`#link-error`, frontmatter, h1 일괄 검증 스크립트)

### regen-original.py 스크립트 추가

- `pages.yaml` 업데이트 후 모든 테스트케이스의 `original.mdx` 를 일괄 재생성
- `tests/reverse-sync/regen-original.py` 로 직접 실행 가능

### 신규 테스트케이스 (21건)

| 유형 | 설명 | 건수 |
|------|------|------|
| Type 13 | 인라인 요소 뒤 공백 소실 | 12 |
| Type 14 | 테이블 전체 소실 | 2 |
| Type 15 | 테이블 정렬 변경 | 3 |
| Type 16 | 리스트 내 코드 블록 파괴 | 1 |
| Type 17 | 리스트 항목 태그/번호 오류 | 2 |
| Type 11 | 교정 내용 원복 (추가) | 1 |

## Added/updated tests?
- [x] Yes — 21건 신규 테스트케이스 추가 (총 38건)

## Additional notes
- `label` 필드: 기존 `title`(실패 설명)을 rename — `page_title`(페이지 제목)과 구분

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Session 459 — P0/P1 experiment matrix, all confirm V3 FINAL optimal

Season replay experiment flags: --ev-ranking, --max-juice, --max-rsc,
--no-rescue, --max-edge-cap. 12 experiments x 4 seasons tested.

Results: V3 FINAL (+444.4u) is near-optimal. Every variant loses money:
- EV ranking: +6.2u (noise, flip-flops)
- Max juice -160: -33.3u (heavy faves profitable)
- Edge floor 0.85/1.00: -44/-132u (volume kill)
- RSC cap 5/4: +6/-20u (noise/over-filter)
- No rescue: -69u (rescue adds real value)
- Max edge 1.5: -75u (cuts good predictions)
- Training window 90d: -36u (120d more stable)

Add geometry proofs practice tab with 45 problems

- New Geometry tab with easy/medium/hard difficulty levels
- Easy (15): definitions (congruent, supplementary, complementary,
  vertical angles, CPCTC), parallel line angle identification,
  triangle angle sum, isosceles triangles, congruence postulates
- Medium (15): fill-in-the-blank proof steps, parallel line angle
  calculations, identify SAS/ASA/AAS/HL from descriptions, linear
  pair, exterior angle theorem, isosceles theorem proof
- Hard (15): multi-blank proofs, CPCTC proofs, parallel lines +
  triangle congruence, algebraic angle proofs, parallelogram
  diagonal proof, angle bisector proof, find-the-error, missing
  statement problems
- Custom diagram drawing for parallel lines with transversals,
  triangles with tick marks and angle arcs, two-triangle
  congruence diagrams, isosceles triangles, parallelograms
- Two-column proof table UI with clickable answer choices
- Multiple choice and proof-fill-in formats

commit.message:
feat(v8): L13.8 kernel-side JIT support — W^X page protection, TurboFan flags, JIT smoke tests

Implements all kernel-side changes needed for TurboFan JIT compilation:

- Add modify_flags() to page table mapper for runtime PTE flag changes
- Create jit_protect.rs: W^X transitions (RW↔RX), icache flush (clflush),
  JIT poison kill-switch (AtomicBool emergency disable)
- Wire SetPermissions in platform_fabric.cc to real page table operations:
  kReadWrite → protect_readwrite, kReadWriteExecute → protect_rwx
- Add v8_fabricos_protect_readwrite() and v8_fabricos_protect_rwx() FFI exports
- Remove --jitless flag, add --no-concurrent-recompilation,
  --no-concurrent-osr, --turbofan-threshold=100
- Add 2 JIT smoke tests: turbofan_jit (loop 200x) and turbofan_correctness
  (fib(20) 150x = 6765)
- Update V8 build scripts for JIT-enabled monolithic build
- V8 JIT rebuild still pending — libv8.a not yet updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Split season page into separate sub-pages (#977)

## Summary

- Split the monolithic season page into 5 focused sub-pages:
championship results (bracket), championship entrants (decklists),
championship draft (pick reasoning), free play rankings (leaderboard),
and free play games (filterable game list)
- `/season/N/` redirects based on precedence: results > entrants >
rankings, depending on tournament state
- Shared `SeasonNav` component provides consistent navigation with h1
and tab bar at 52rem centered width across all sub-pages
- All stateful pages (rankings, games) encode filter state in URL params
and restore from URL on load
- All sub-pages use wide layout; content-specific max-widths keep
narrower pages (entrants, draft, games) from stretching

## Test plan

- [x] `make check` passes (lint, typecheck, tests)
- [x] Internal link test verifies no broken links
- [x] Verified redirect pages use JS `window.location.replace()` with
meta refresh fallback (no flash)
- [x] Navigation width is consistent across all 5 sub-pages

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
feat: apply ralph loop best practices + repo tidy

Ralph loop improvements (from design spec review):
- implementer: add "search before implementing" step to prevent duplicate code
- implementer: rename "placeholder" prohibition to "silent stubs" — TODO comments
  are explicitly allowed; fake-data stubs that compile are not
- solo: add "commit after each verified change" step (core Ralph discipline)
- solo: replace absurd-numbered recovery hints with proper ## If Stuck section,
  matching the pattern already established in implementer.md
- team: add verification-backward pre-decomposition questions to Phase 1
- architect: add "done criteria" to Task Decomposition principles, closing the
  loop from team.md's verification design down to where tasks are authored

Native subagent frontmatter:
- all agents/*.md: add name/model/tools frontmatter (proper Claude Code subagent
  definitions, not just persona files injected into prompts)
- all commands/*.md: add name: field

Shell robustness:
- all scripts/hooks: #!/bin/bash → #!/usr/bin/env bash (portability)
- hooks.json: explicit bash "..." invocation with quoted paths (spaces safety)

Repo tidy:
- rename tests/ → .tests/ (dot-prefix hides from non-test tooling)
- add .github/workflows/ci.yml
- plugin.json: add author URL and homepage
- README: update test path, add /plugin update section
- .gitignore: add editor artifacts, settings.json (auto-generated, local-only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: define __dirname='/' via turbopack.define and webpack DefinePlugin for edge bundle

next/dist/compiled/cookie uses __dirname in its ncc wrapper. Turbopack replaces it
in local builds but not in Vercel's edge environment, causing:
  ReferenceError: __dirname is not defined → MIDDLEWARE_INVOCATION_FAILED

Revert failed globalThis polyfill from middleware.ts. Instead, stub __dirname
at the bundler level using turbopack.define (Turbopack) and webpack DefinePlugin
(webpack fallback), both set to '/' to satisfy the __nccwpck_require__.ab assignment.

agent silently aborts at every async boundary.

commit.message:
fix: pause/unpause — game loop died when entering paused state

scheduleNext() bails when state !== 'playing', so togglePause() entering
'paused' killed the game loop. The paused render loop (which checks for
unpause keys) was never started, making the game permanently frozen.

Fix: togglePause() and pause() now schedule the paused render loop
directly via setTimeout(gameLoop, 100). Also updated overlay text to
show both P and Esc as unpause keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

lean4: formalize syntax adequacy and pretend test criteria

ProgramAlgebra.lean gains two new sections:
- Section 9: SyntaxCodec, CellEssence, faithfulness criterion
- Section 10: EvalOracle, pretend test formalization

These connect the Lean algebra to the syntax discovery work:
a syntax is adequate iff it faithfully encodes CellDecl,
and the pretend test passes iff the LLM's eval-one oracle
agrees with the formal readySet semantics.

Still sorry-free across entire BeadCalculus project.

Initial implementation of rustsynth - Pilot Rust TUI synthesizer

- UDP server (port 49161) with alphanumeric note command parser

- 4 effect groups with 15 effects (reverb, delay, filters, etc.)
- Send-based routing matrix (16 voices × 4 groups)
- Lock-free audio engine using crossbeam-channel + arc-swap
- 3-mode Ratatui TUI (Voices, FX Groups, Routing)
- All unit tests passing
